parameters.query:
WITH this_week AS (
  SELECT 'this' as period, w.domain, e.referrer_domain, COUNT(*) as sessions
  FROM website_event e JOIN website w ON w.website_id=e.website_id
  WHERE e.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND e.referrer_domain IN ('perplexity.ai','chatgpt.com','claude.ai','copilot.microsoft.com','gemini.google.com','you.com','phind.com','chat.openai.com','bing.com')
  GROUP BY w.domain, e.referrer_domain
), prev_week AS (
  SELECT 'prev' as period, w.domain, e.referrer_domain, COUNT(*) as sessions
  FROM website_event e JOIN website w ON w.website_id=e.website_id
  WHERE e.created_at BETWEEN NOW()-INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days' AND e.referrer_domain IN ('perplexity.ai','chatgpt.com','claude.ai','copilot.microsoft.com','gemini.google.com','you.com','phind.com','chat.openai.com','bing.com')
  GROUP BY w.domain, e.referrer_domain
)
SELECT * FROM this_week UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev_week
UNION ALL SELECT 'this','none','no-ai-traffic',0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM this_week)
ORDER BY period, sessions DESC

parameters.fileContent: ={{ JSON.stringify({ date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), total: $json.thisTotal, bySource: $json.bySource }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '-1003767033253', text: $('Build Report').first().json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
